title: Fuelcell Energy (FCEL) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: FuelCell Energy consensus analyst rating: Hold based on 0 buy ratings, 3 hold ratings, and 1 sell rating. J.P. Morgan has given FCEL a Sell rating. Four analysts covering FCEL have consensus rating of Hold with average price target of $8.31, forecasting 26.10% upside potential over next year. FCEL average analyst price target in past 3 months is $8.75. TipRanks data shows FCEL has 20.69% upside potential based on analysts' average price target. Stock remains positioned as Hold despite company's expansion into high-growth AI data center power market. Analyst concerns center on company fundamentals: despite 60% YoY revenue growth in recent periods, FCEL missed expectations by $11 million and continues posting negative gross margins with product sales generating $0.73 per dollar in costs. Recent analyst sentiment notes divergence between market enthusiasm for fuel cell sector driven by AI infrastructure demands and traditional financial metrics showing ongoing profitability challenges. Price target range varies but consensus suggests limited upside near $8-8.75 levels despite structural market opportunity.
